sources.name: Material Design
sources.usage: component state hierarchy and color role inspiration
sources.notes: Do not copy implementation code or Material-specific naming into core theme source. Use for reference patterns only.

sources.name: Fluent Design System
sources.usage: Win32/desktop UI patterns, depth, and layering inspiration
sources.notes: Primary reference for Spaces desktop shell UI patterns. Do not embed Fluent-specific component names or tokens.

sources.name: Bootstrap
sources.usage: component role and layout pattern inspiration
sources.notes: Use for reference patterns and naming comparisons only. Do not introduce Bootstrap class names or utility-first patterns.

sources.name: Tabler UI
sources.usage: dashboard and control component naming inspiration
sources.notes: Reference for admin/dashboard UI patterns. Unrelated to Tabler Icons despite shared branding.

sources.name: shadcn/ui
sources.usage: semantic component naming and state pattern inspiration
sources.notes: Component API patterns used as a reference model for semantic component token naming conventions.

sources.name: Radix Primitives
sources.usage: component behavior and accessibility state reference
sources.notes: Used as a reference for component state coverage (open/closed, checked/unchecked, selected, disabled, etc.).

sources.name: Ant Design
sources.usage: component token naming and design variable conventions
sources.notes: Ant Design v5 design token system used as a reference for component-level token granularity.

sources.name: Awesome WinUI
sources.usage: Windows/WinUI component patterns and desktop UI references
sources.notes: Curated list of WinUI 3 resources. Reference for Win32/desktop shell component organization and naming.

sources.name: MDB UI Kit
sources.usage: responsive component library patterns and responsive breakpoint strategy
sources.notes: Material Design Bootstrap-based library. Reference for responsive design patterns and component breakpoints.

sources.name: PixelKit Bootstrap UI Kits
sources.usage: desktop/web UI kit component family patterns
sources.notes: Multi-theme Bootstrap UI Kit collection. Reference for component family organization and theme switching patterns.

sources.name: Flutter UI Kit
sources.usage: mobile/cross-platform component family and motion patterns
sources.notes: Reference for component family organization in mobile contexts and transition/motion design patterns.

sources.name: FlatUI
sources.usage: flat design aesthetic and minimalist component styling
sources.notes: Reference for flat/minimal design direction. Useful for component minimal family variant.

sources.name: Kitten Tricks
sources.usage: mobile UI component showcase and state management patterns
sources.notes: React Native mobile showcase. Reference for component state management and mobile-first interaction patterns.

sources.name: Aragon UI
sources.usage: modern component composition and token-driven styling patterns
sources.notes: Decentralized governance UI system. Reference for compositional component architecture and token-driven styling.

sources.name: Tabler
sources.usage: dashboard/admin UI patterns and icon system organization
sources.notes: Admin dashboard template system. Reference for dashboard-specific component patterns and icon pack integration.

sources.name: SnapKit
sources.usage: layout constraint and spacing system reference
sources.notes: iOS layout framework. Reference for constraint-based layout models and spacing/sizing hierarchies.

sources.name: Tamagui
sources.usage: universal theme token system across web and native platforms
sources.notes: Cross-platform design system. Reference for implementing consistent tokens across desktop, web, and mobile targets.

sources.name: React Native UI Kitten
sources.usage: mobile component theming and runtime theme switching patterns
sources.notes: Mobile-first component theming system. Reference for runtime theme selection and mobile component families.

sources.name: Material Kit
sources.usage: Material Design template and component showcase patterns
sources.notes: Production Material Design UI template. Reference for template-level component organization.

sources.name: PermissionsKit
sources.usage: system integration UI patterns and modal/dialog styling
sources.notes: iOS system integration library. Reference for permission/system dialog styling and integration patterns.

sources.name: Element Starter
sources.usage: enterprise component library organization and theme variable strategy
sources.notes: Enterprise Vue component system. Reference for large-scale component organization and theme variable management.

sources.name: Augmented UI
sources.usage: specialized UI effects and visual enhancement patterns
sources.notes: CSS-based UI enhancement library. Reference for decorative and enhancement layer patterns (future expansion).

sources.name: Bevypunk
sources.usage: cyberpunk/futuristic UI aesthetic and motion design patterns
sources.notes: Game engine UI system with cyberpunk aesthetic. Reference for futuristic and cyber component family design direction.

sources.name: Discord Cyberpunk 2077 Theme
sources.usage: cyberpunk visual direction and color harmony patterns
sources.notes: Custom Discord theme with cyberpunk aesthetic. Reference for cyber-futuristic color schemes and neon/high-contrast patterns.
